channel.title: Cron on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Cron on Pi Stack

item.title: Self-Hosted Cron Job Monitoring: Healthchecks vs Uptime Kuma vs Prometheus 2026
item.description: Cron jobs run the infrastructure: database backups, report generation, data synchronization, cleanup tasks. When they fail silently, the consequences range from stale dashboards to data loss. A dedicated cron job monitoring system sends you an alert the moment a scheduled task misses its window, so you can fix problems before they compound.
